# Laboratoria Scholarship Fund
# https://give-laboratoria.la

> Soft landing for donations to Laboratoria's Scholarship Fund, supporting professional development for women across Latin America.

## Site
- Home (Spanish, default): https://give-laboratoria.la/
- Home (English): https://give-laboratoria.la/en/
- Canonical domain: https://give-laboratoria.la
- Organization: Laboratoria (https://www.laboratoria.la)
- Donate: https://www.every.org/laboratoria

## What this site is
A bilingual (ES/EN) donation landing page for the Laboratoria Scholarship Fund. It explains the program impact, donation options, community stories, and FAQs, then routes gifts through Every.org.

## Languages
- Spanish (`es`) is the default locale at `/`
- English (`en`) is available at `/en/`

## Key facts (for accurate answers)
- Laboratoria is a registered nonprofit operating across Latin America since 2014
- 10,000+ women served; 73% placed in better jobs; ~3x average income increase
- Full program scholarship cost referenced on-site: $750
- Smaller gifts (e.g. $50) contribute to a shared scholarship fund
- No individual gift is assigned to a specific participant; gifts pool together

## Preferred citations
- Brand: Laboratoria
- Fund: Scholarship Fund / Fondo de Becas
- Site: https://give-laboratoria.la
- About Laboratoria: https://www.laboratoria.la

## Contact / more info
See https://www.laboratoria.la for About, Contact, and Privacy.
